name: DistanceListConverter
summary: The DistanceListConverter class converts types to and from the distance list type.

constructors.name: DistanceListConverter
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DistanceListConverter class

methods.name: CanConvertFrom
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the source type to the distance list type.

methods.name: CanConvertTo
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the distance list type to the destination type.

methods.name: ConvertFrom
methods.summary: Converts an object from the given culture to the distance list type.

methods.name: ConvertTo
methods.summary: Converts an object from the distance list type to the given destination type.
